one_time_description: Province of BC - New School Construction funding received of $10,180,825 in 2024, resulting in large deferred revenue balance of $5,963,708
economic_notes: Band operates multiple commercial enterprises including Smelqmix Investments Limited Partnership, Skulqalt Forestry Ltd., Lower Similkameen Community Forests Ltd., and others. New Semlqmix Protect Area Trust Fund established December 2023 invested in Socially Responsible Investments through Vancouver Foundation. Active forestry operations generating $2,063,939 revenue.
notes: Large one-time capital funding from Province of BC for New School Construction ($10,180,825 received in 2024, creating $5,963,708 in deferred revenue). ISC funding nearly doubled year-over-year ($6.1M in 2023 to $14.9M in 2024) largely due to capital project funding. Six GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. Five funds consolidated on line-by-line basis. No schedule of remuneration for Chief, Council or staff included in provided statements. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($14,869,183), FNHA ($1,351,100), Province of BC ($2,175,477), Environment Canada ($1,529,000), FNESC ($467,314), CMHC ($130,303), ONA ($120,997) = $6,670,534 approximate; used total government transfers estimate based on identifiable government sources. Annual debt service reflects principal repayments only per cash flow statement.
